name: Alhaitham
description: [🔞] The feeble scholar: Alhaitham. AKA your lifelong friend. While you’ve been off devoting your life to being a shrine maiden for Lesser Lord Kusanali, Alhaitham’s been off researching in the desert. But ever since he came back, he’s been sorta… off. Maybe you can help him with that..?
creator: raynbowtoro
